sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Flexible Solutions International targets $50M-$60M annual revenue run rate from food contracts by 2027 as plant expansions advance
feed.summary: NULL

feed.title: FIAT Stock Price | YieldMax Short COIN Option Income Strategy ETF
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information about the YieldMax Short COIN Option Income Strategy ETF (FIAT), including its current stock price, trading exchange, and key financial metrics. It offers a comprehensive overview of the ETF's holdings, historical data, dividends, and technical analysis indicators. The report also addresses common FAQs about FIAT, such as its performance, expense ratio, and dividend yield, and details its investment strategy.

feed.title: General Mills Issues €1.7 Billion Long-Term Subordinated Notes
feed.summary: General Mills (GIS) is issuing €1.7 billion in long-dated junior subordinated notes to support its capital structure and funding flexibility. The offering consists of €1.0 billion of 4.750% Series A notes and €700 million of 5.250% Series B notes, both maturing in 2056. TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates GIS as Neutral, citing weakening financial performance and a bearish technical setup, but acknowledges a supportive dividend yield and plans for margin recovery.

feed.title: State Street Q1 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides a brief preview of State Street's (NYSE: STT) Q1 2026 earnings. It indicates that the content is a preview of the company's financial performance for the first quarter of 2026.

feed.title: Caesars Casino Bonus Code ROTOCASLAUNCH in April: Score $1k & 2.5K Rewards Credits
feed.summary: The Caesars Casino bonus code ROTOCASLAUNCH offers new players a $10 no-deposit bonus, a 100% deposit match up to $1,000, and 2,500 Caesars Rewards Credits. This bundled promotion is available in Michigan, New Jersey, West Virginia, and Pennsylvania, providing both immediate play and long-term value through its loyalty program integration. Wagering requirements for bonuses specifically apply to select slot games and must be met within seven days.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Suffered from “Death Of Software” and ” AI Seat Contraction” Narrative
feed.summary: Lakehouse Capital's "Lakehouse Global Growth Fund" reported a decline in February 2026 due to the "AI disruption" narrative, which particularly impacted enterprise software investments. Despite this, the fund increased holdings in resilient software companies like ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW), believing their fundamental growth remains healthy. ServiceNow, a cloud-based software company, has faced challenges from the "death of software" and AI "seat contraction" narratives but showed strong quarterly results, exceeding guidance and analyst expectations, with its new AI solutions hitting $600 million in annual contract value.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT), inviting investors who incurred losses to come forward as lead plaintiffs. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, failing to disclose its inability to meet consulting revenue targets or maintain its CV growth rate. Investors are encouraged to contact the law firm by the May 18, 2026, deadline to participate.

feed.title: New Dungeons & Dragons show lets fans try unreleased content
feed.summary: Wizards of the Coast, a division of Hasbro, announced "Dungeon Masters," a new official Dungeons & Dragons actual play series premiering April 22 on YouTube. The show will feature unreleased D&D content, innovative visuals, and an all-star cast including Jasmine Bhullar, Mayanna Berrin, Christian Navarro, Neil Newbon, and Devora Wilde. Fans will also have the opportunity to play the unreleased content on D&D Beyond directly following each episode.

feed.title: The Port of Philadelphia welcomes Norwegian Cruise Line with inaugural call of Norwegian Jewel
feed.summary: The Port of Philadelphia celebrated a significant milestone with the maiden call of Norwegian Cruise Line's Norwegian Jewel, marking the return of cruise service to Philadelphia after more than 15 years. This event signifies a new chapter for the port, city, and region, strengthening its role as a global travel gateway and economic contributor. Norwegian Cruise Line, in collaboration with PhilaPort, is building a new terminal to facilitate cruise operations, with Norwegian Jewel offering voyages to Bermuda, Canada, and New England.

feed.title: Smucker's Marmelade: Private Label Pressure Could Reshape Category Growth
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker Company's Smucker's Marmelade faces increasing competition from surging private label brands and innovative emerging brands that are capturing significant market share and growth. This shift, driven by consumers' preference for affordability and novelty, challenges established players to adapt through innovation, strong branding, and leveraging technology to maintain their market position and influence investor portfolios.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. stock (US0311621009): Is obesity drug momentum strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (US0311621009) is presented as a biotech powerhouse strong in rare diseases and inflammation, now expanding into obesity and cardiovascular treatments. The article highlights Amgen's business model based on high-margin biologics and strategic acquisitions, positioning it as a defensive quality stock for U.S. investors. While new obesity drug MariTide offers significant growth potential, the company faces risks like patent expirations and biosimilar competition.

feed.title: Eaton Corp plc stock (IE00B8KQN827): Why electrification trends matter more now for long-term invest
feed.summary: Eaton Corp plc (NYSE: ETN) is highlighted as a strategic investment due to its central role in global electrification and the data center growth boom. The article emphasizes how Eaton's diversified power management portfolio drives steady growth, benefits from increasing demand for renewable energy integration, and supports critical infrastructure like AI data centers. Investors are encouraged to consider Eaton for its strong financial position, focus on software solutions, and exposure to major economic trends despite potential cyclical risks.

feed.title: Pumpkin Spice Latte: Between Seasonal Hype and Private Label Pressure, Retail Shifts Intensify
feed.summary: Starbucks' iconic Pumpkin Spice Latte is facing increasing challenges from private label brands and emerging competitors as consumers prioritize affordability due to economic pressures. The article explores how the PSL, a premium item, is navigating a retail landscape where value is becoming more important, and how Starbucks is using technology and loyalty programs to maintain its market position. The performance of the PSL is presented as a bellwether for consumer spending habits and Starbucks' resilience in a consolidating market.

feed.title: Masco Corp stock (US5745991068): Why its home improvement resilience matters more now
feed.summary: Masco Corp stock is well-positioned for steady growth in the home improvement sector due to its strong brands like Delta Faucet, KraftMaid cabinets, and Behr paint. The company's focus on innovation, operational efficiency, and a solid financial position makes it attractive to investors seeking exposure to cyclical recovery without high volatility. Masco benefits from both new construction and existing home renovations, with its products being staples in remodels and its sustainability efforts aligning with consumer preferences.

feed.title: General Mills announces €1.7 billion notes offering due 2056
feed.summary: General Mills Inc. announced a notes offering of €1 billion and €700 million in junior subordinated notes due 2056, totaling €1.7 billion. This debt raise occurs while shares are trading near their 52-week low, and InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued. The offering is expected to close on Thursday, pending customary conditions, and the funds will be used for general corporate purposes.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors Q1 Preview: Auto Disappoints, But A New Growth Driver Is Coming (NXPI)
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) is expected to report Q1 earnings on April 28, with likely stable results but no dramatic upside. The automotive segment, NXPI’s largest, continues to underperform, prompting caution in initiating a position. While physical AI and robotics present a promising new growth driver, their near-term revenue impact is expected to be modest, though the long-term total addressable market (TAM) is attractive.

feed.title: PPG returned $1.4B to shareholders, extending 54 years of dividend hikes
feed.summary: PPG reported $15.9 billion in net sales for 2025, driven by a 2% increase in organic sales. The company returned $1.4 billion to shareholders through $790 million in stock repurchases and $630 million in dividends, marking its 54th consecutive year of annual dividend increases. PPG also highlighted its focus on digital transformation, increased sustainably advantaged products, and community engagement efforts.

feed.title: American Express acquiring AI expense startup Hyper
feed.summary: American Express (AmEx) is acquiring Hyper, an AI-focused expense management startup backed by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, to enhance its automation tools for commercial clients. Hyper's AI agents automate expense workflows, a technology already integrated into the Hypercard Rewards American Express card. This acquisition is part of AmEx's broader strategy to expand into AI-driven commercial services, with the deal expected to close in Q2 2026.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has filed a Form 424B2 preliminary pricing supplement for Uncapped Dual Directional Buffered Return Enhanced Notes. These notes are linked to the lesser performing of the iShares MSCI EAFE ETF and the EURO STOXX 50 Index, are fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., and are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return on appreciation or a capped return on depreciation up to a 15% buffer. The filing details the product's structure, key terms, risk considerations, and tax implications, indicating an expected pricing date around April 21, 2026.

feed.title: BNY Stock Hits 52-Week High - Here's Why
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK) shares surged after beating Q1 2026 analyst expectations on both earnings and revenue, reaching a new 52-week high. The bank reported a 42% increase in diluted EPS, a 13% rise in total revenue to a record $5.409 billion, and strong growth across its Securities Services and Market and Wealth Services businesses. The company also returned $1.4 billion to shareholders and authorized a new $10 billion share repurchase program.

feed.title: NetApp (NTAP) Partners with Google Cloud for Enhanced Storage Solutions
feed.summary: NetApp Inc. (NTAP) has announced a four-year partnership with Google Cloud to integrate storage solutions within the Google Distributed Cloud (GDC) framework, focusing on public sector modernization with enhanced security and compliance. The company has a GF Score of 91/100, indicating strong overall financial performance, particularly in profitability and growth. Despite insider selling activity totaling $0.3 million over the past three months, NetApp's current P/E ratio suggests a reasonable valuation.

feed.title: 195 Illinois groups got $1.2M from Illinois American Water in 2025
feed.summary: Illinois American Water and the American Water Charitable Foundation provided over $1.2 million in community support across Illinois in 2025. This included $785,000 from the company and $411,000 from the foundation, benefiting 195 organizations. Key areas of support were customer assistance, public safety, health, sustainability, and employee volunteering.

feed.title: Illinois American Water and American Water Charitable Foundation Provide Over $1.2 Million in Community Support Across Illinois in 2025
feed.summary: Illinois American Water and the American Water Charitable Foundation together provided over $1.2 million in community support across Illinois in 2025. This support included grants, charitable contributions, and programming support for 195 organizations, with specific allocations for fire and rescue, health and wellness, and community sustainability organizations. Employees also volunteered significant hours and raised funds for charitable causes.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Element Solutions: “We Think It’s a Very, Very Good Company”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed a positive outlook on Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI), a specialty chemicals company, despite its stagnant performance over the last five years. He highlighted recent improvements in sales and earnings growth, noting that it trades at a lower valuation compared to Qnity. Cramer advised that Element Solutions is a good option for investors looking to enter the chemical space, particularly benefiting from current semiconductor and geopolitical demand, but acknowledged potential risks if these conditions change.

feed.title: International Business Machines Could Raise 2026 Revenue Outlook After Potential Q1 Beat, Oppenheimer Says
feed.summary: Oppenheimer suggests that International Business Machines (IBM) may raise its 2026 revenue outlook if it reports a strong first-quarter performance. This positive forecast indicates potential growth for the company based on its upcoming financial results. The analyst firm is optimistic about IBM's ability to exceed expectations.

feed.title: Vertical Aerospace completes first two-way piloted transition flight (EVTL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Vertical Aerospace (EVTL) announced the successful completion of its first two-way piloted transition flight in a full-scale tiltrotor eVTOL, marking a significant milestone in civil aviation. This achievement led to a rise in the company's premarket trading. The flight represents a key step for the company in the development of its electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft.

feed.title: Exelon CEO says ComEd unit is going to increase load in Illinois by 19 gigawatts by 2030 - Semafor event
feed.summary: Exelon's CEO announced at a Semafor event that its ComEd unit plans to increase its load in Illinois by 19 gigawatts by the year 2030. This significant increase in load highlights the company's projected growth and infrastructure development in the state. The article also provides recent analyst ratings and price target adjustments for Exelon Corporation.

feed.title: Corning (GLW) SVP Stefan Becker converts PSUs/RSUs, withholds shares for taxes
feed.summary: Corning's SVP, Finance and Corporate Controller, Stefan Becker, exercised 31,046 Performance Share Units (PSUs) and 13,734 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026, converting them into common shares. A total of 22,861 common shares were subsequently disposed of to cover tax obligations at $168.27 per share, leaving Becker with 28,263 directly held common shares. The filing also details remaining unvested PSUs and RSUs, which vest between April 2026 and April 2029, subject to service-based vesting requirements.

feed.title: Cheddar’s Scratch Kitchen to Open May 11 at former Bahama Breeze Location in Gainesville
feed.summary: Cheddar’s Scratch Kitchen is scheduled to open its first Gainesville location on May 11 at the former Bahama Breeze site in Butler Plaza North. This move is part of Darden Restaurants' strategy to convert some Bahama Breeze locations into Cheddar's Scratch Kitchens after closing all 28 Bahama Breeze restaurants in April 2025. The new restaurant will offer made-from-scratch American comfort food.

feed.title: Five Florida groups win Duke grants for housing, veterans, beach access
feed.summary: The Duke Energy Foundation has awarded $22,500 to five Florida nonprofits as part of its America250 grants, supporting initiatives like affordable housing, ADA-compliant beach access, veteran assistance, and community cleanups. This first round of Florida grants is part of a larger $250,000 initial investment across Duke Energy's service area, with a total commitment exceeding $1 million for the America250 initiative. The funding aims to strengthen communities by addressing local needs and celebrating American independence.

feed.title: Duke Energy Foundation announces first round of America250 grants to strengthen Florida communities
feed.summary: The Duke Energy Foundation has awarded $22,500 in grants to five Florida nonprofit organizations as part of its America250 initiative, a broader $1 million investment across its service area. These grants aim to strengthen communities by supporting projects like affordable housing, ADA-compliant boardwalks, independence day celebrations, community cleanups, and providing meals for veterans. This initial round highlights the foundation's commitment to local community development and engagement as the nation approaches its 250th anniversary.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: KeyCorp beats Q1 2026 forecasts, stock dips
feed.summary: KeyCorp reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, surpassing Wall Street expectations for both EPS ($0.44 vs. $0.42) and revenue ($1.95 billion vs. $1.94 billion). Despite these positive results, the stock dipped 1.53% in pre-market trading, reflecting broader market sentiment. The company highlighted improved net interest margin, record investment banking fees, and updated its full-year guidance for NII and loan growth upwards.

feed.title: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) to sell euro junior subordinated notes
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) has agreed to sell €1 billion of 4.750% Series A fixed-to-fixed reset rate junior subordinated notes due 2056 and €700 million of 5.250% Series B junior subordinated notes due 2056. The notes are being sold through an Underwriting Agreement with Barclays, Deutsche Bank, Citigroup, and J.P. Morgan, and the sale is expected to close on April 16, 2026. This offering is registered via Form S-3 and detailed in an 8-K filing.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley see stock surge from AI boom
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are experiencing a significant surge in their stock prices due to the artificial intelligence boom. The banks are profiting heavily from underwriting bonds, advising on deals, and managing assets for major tech companies investing billions in AI infrastructure. This financial activity highlights how Wall Street is directly benefiting from the massive capital expenditures driven by AI development.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Shareholder Falters in Suit to Force Proxy Proposal
feed.summary: A US District Court judge denied a Canadian charitable corporation's request for a preliminary injunction against UnitedHealth Group Inc. The injunction would have forced UnitedHealth to allow shareholders to vote on a proposal concerning the health-care consequences of its corporate acquisitions. The judge stated that while the proposal raises significant policy issues, it's not yet clear if it sufficiently transcends ordinary business operations according to SEC standards.

feed.title: Apple releases 2026 environmental progress report
feed.summary: Apple has released its 2026 environmental progress report, highlighting that 30 percent of materials across all products shipped in 2025 came from recycled content. Key achievements include using 100 percent recycled cobalt in batteries and rare earth elements in magnets, and removing plastic from packaging. The company also introduced new recycling technologies like Cora and A.R.I.S. and expanded its use of renewable energy.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Madison Air Raises More than $2.2 Billion in its IPO
feed.summary: Madison Air (NYSE: MAIR) has successfully raised over $2.2 billion in its initial public offering (IPO). The company's CEO, Jill Wyant, is set to join NYSE Live to celebrate this significant milestone. This news comes as the New York Stock Exchange provides daily pre-market updates, with markets showing gains and the S&P 500 recently closing above 7,000 for the first time.

feed.title: Could American and United Airlines really merge? Wall Street is taking idea seriously
feed.summary: Wall Street is seriously considering the possibility of a merger between American Airlines and United Airlines following reports that United's CEO has pitched the idea. Such a deal would significantly reshape the U.S. aviation landscape and would likely face scrutiny from regulators. Analysts are weighing in on the logic behind a potential merger.

feed.title: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Valuation After CEO Change And Activist Investor Involvement
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is re-emerging into investor focus due to a CEO change, activist investor involvement from Elliott Investment Management, and recent market volatility. Despite recent setbacks, the stock shows strong long-term momentum and is currently trading at a discount to the average analyst price target. A popular narrative suggests NCLH is undervalued with a fair value of $45.00, driven by growth assumptions and margin recovery.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Price Target on Amcor to $44 From $48, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for Amcor (AMCR) to $44, down from $48, while maintaining an Equalweight rating on the stock. The change reflects a revised outlook from the financial firm. This update follows several other analyst adjustments for Amcor in recent weeks, including actions by Jefferies, BofA Securities, and Deutsche Bank.

feed.title: AMD Stock Hits Record High – Bernstein Says AI Ambitions Get a Boost With Meta Deal
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock reached a record high driven by its growing role in AI infrastructure. Bernstein raised its price target for AMD to $265 from $235, maintaining a "Market Perform" rating, citing strong server demand from AI and high-performance computing. This positive outlook is further bolstered by a significant deal with Meta Platforms for customized AI accelerators and a new agreement with the French government to expand AMD's global AI footprint.

feed.title: EverCommerce Inc stock (US29978A1043): Is its SaaS platform strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: EverCommerce Inc. provides vertical SaaS solutions for service businesses, streamlining operations in sectors like home services and healthcare. The company's business model relies on recurring subscription revenue and a strategy of acquiring niche software providers to consolidate fragmented markets. Analysts have a positive outlook, citing strong retention rates and acquisition strategy, though risks like integration challenges and macroeconomic sensitivity remain.

feed.title: Hormuz Closed, Oil At $90 — These 7 Stocks Haven't Repriced - APA (NASDAQ:APA), Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN)
feed.summary: Despite oil prices exceeding $90 a barrel and ongoing energy crises, seven major energy producers and refiners, including APA Corp. and Devon Energy, are trading at significant discounts, with forward price-to-earnings multiples between 7x and 11x, half the S&P 500 average. This valuation gap presents a dilemma for investors: either a mispricing opportunity if the Hormuz disruption persists, potentially driving oil prices higher and boosting free cash flow, or a potential trap if a swift resolution to the crisis causes oil prices to collapse. The market's current valuation seems to implicitly factor in a potential fall in oil prices or an early peak in the earnings cycle, highlighting the ongoing uncertainty in the energy sector.

feed.title: Beverage sector profitability rankings: Coca-Cola and PepsiCo lead the pack (PEP:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Coca-Cola and PepsiCo are top performers in the beverage sector, leading profitability rankings with A+ grades based on Seeking Alpha's quantitative rating system. PepsiCo reported strong Q1 2026 results, exceeding revenue and EPS estimates, driven by growth in convenience foods and effective brand strategies. Other highly profitable companies include National Beverage and Monster Beverage.

feed.title: The TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) Board Raises Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) recently announced a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.48 per share, payable on June 4, 2026. This decision follows strong financial results for fiscal year 2026, including a 9% increase in Q4 net sales to $17.7 billion and diluted EPS growth of 28%. The company also reported full-year net sales of $60.4 billion, a 7% increase, and returned $4.3 billion to shareholders through dividends and repurchases.

feed.title: P&G warns shareholders against below-market mini-tender offer
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (P&G) has issued a warning to its shareholders regarding an unsolicited mini-tender offer from Potemkin Limited to purchase P&G common stock at a price significantly below the market value. P&G explicitly states it does not endorse the offer and advises shareholders not to tender their shares, emphasizing the lack of investor protections associated with such mini-tender offers. The company urges shareholders to consult with financial advisors and obtain current market quotations before making any decisions.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Hits All-Time High on 12-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock reached a new all-time high, extending its winning streak to 12 consecutive days, a first since 2005. The stock's surge, up 37% over the last 12 days and 24% year-to-date, is attributed to strong Q1 earnings from its manufacturing partner TSMC, indicating high demand for AI chips, and an improved broader market sentiment. Analysts are increasingly bullish on AMD, raising price targets ahead of its Q1 earnings report on May 5, citing its partnership with Meta, upcoming AI chips, and software stack.

feed.title: Vertical to build on transition flight success as next prototype waits in the wings
feed.summary: Vertical Aerospace is building on the success of its VX4 eVTOL prototype's two-way transition flight, which occurred on April 14. The company plans to further expand the aircraft's flight envelope, particularly regarding wind limits, and is preparing to fly its third prototype within days or weeks. This progress supports future demonstration flights in the UK and customer demonstrations, with certification-conforming Valo aircraft expected next year.

feed.title: Corning (NYSE: GLW) tech chief exercises 50,914 units, withholds shares for tax
feed.summary: Corning Incorporated's SVP and Chief Technology Officer, Jaymin Amin, exercised 50,914 stock units, converting restricted and performance share units into common stock. To cover tax liabilities, 24,796 shares were withheld at $168.27 each, rather than sold on the open market. Following these transactions, Amin directly holds 113,878 common shares and an additional 2,602.1433 shares indirectly through a 401(k) fund, retaining unvested equity awards with future vesting dates.

feed.title: How EnerSys’ EnerGize Reset and US$1 Billion Buyback Will Impact EnerSys (ENS) Investors
feed.summary: EnerSys (ENS) has initiated a company-wide "EnerGize" reset focusing on core energy storage, cost efficiency, and execution, coinciding with a US$1.00 billion share repurchase program. This comes as telecom demand shows signs of recovery and the company aims to translate its market position into steady cash generation. While the initiatives support near-term recovery and per-share outcomes, investors should consider the risk of flat organic growth in traditional markets.
